200# return «
choose a throne:

Event: Gladiator Adventure
Event Date: 15/05/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E40
Winning Strategy Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while the engraving owner steals 25% / 26% / 27% / 28% / 30% / 32% / 35% damage from a random enemy unit for 3 sec and petrifies them. The target takes 35% more damage and can't move for 3 sec. The petrified enemy unit also takes physical damage equal to 50% / 60% / 70% / 80% / 100% / 120% / 150% of the engraving owner's attack.

Enhancement: 2
12000 Dodge from the gems
Once in a while the engraving owner steals 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% / 37% / 40% damage from 2 random enemy units for 3 sec and petrifies them. The targets take 35% more damage and can't move for 3 sec. The petrified enemy units also take physical damage equal to 75% / 100% / 110% / 120% / 130% / 150% / 175% of the engraving owner's attack every second for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 3
25000 Dodge from the gems
Once in a while the engraving owner turns a random enemy into a rock for 3 sec. The target can't move and takes 45% more damage. The target also takes 23500 / 33600 / 48000 / 64000 / 80000 / 100000 / 125000 magic damage every second for the duration.
When the effect runs out, the target explodes. The explosion deals 28200 / 40300 / 57600 / 76800 / 96000 / 120000 / 150000 pure damage to the target, and their physical and magic armor are reduced by 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 20% / 22% / 25% for 4 sec. 2 nearby enemies are hit by rocks. The rocks deal 56400 / 80600 / 115200 / 153600 / 192000 / 240000 / 300000 physical damage on impact and stun for 2 sec.
The engraving owner also steals 35% / 36% / 37% / 38% / 40% / 42% / 45% damage from 2 more random enemy units for 3 sec and petrifies them. The targets take 35% more damage and can't move for 3 sec. The petrified enemy units also take physical damage equal to 100% / 110% / 120% / 130% / 150% / 170% / 200% of the engraving owner's attack every second for 3 sec.

Requirements:
